rows.description: Candidate drop penalty from BBID. Waiver pickup rule: 35% of current-year salary (8,000 x 35%). Applied to 2021 because the drop occurred on or after the 2020 FreeAgent auction start (2020-08-17).
rows.status_detail: Projected from add/drop transaction history plus the pre-drop contract snapshot.

rows.description: Candidate drop penalty from FREE_AGENT. Projected current-rule penalty: 75% of TCV is 6,000; earned to date is 5,000. Applied to 2021 because the drop occurred on or after the 2020 FreeAgent auction start (2020-08-17).
rows.status_detail: Projected from add/drop transaction history plus the pre-drop contract snapshot.
rows.penalty_rule: 75% of TCV (6,000) minus earned to date (5,000)
